name: Harbor Fish Burger
description: A fish burger. Freshly baked bread is sliced open. Then, layers of crisp greens, seasoned fish fillet, and sliced onions are added to it. Finally, it is finished with a drizzle of sauce. The burger has a savory-tart flavor that truly whets the appetite.

suspicious.name: Suspicious Harbor Fish Burger
suspicious.description: A fish burger. It features a fillet of a dull, greyish hue that fills one with hesitation. A bitter surge assaults your senses from the very first bite, just like a cup of frigid seawater utterly douses any lingering sparks of hope. It seems excessive marinating has stripped the fish of the freshness it once possessed...
suspicious.effect: Increases all party members' Max HP by 20% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s).

normal.name: Harbor Fish Burger
normal.description: A fish burger. Freshly baked bread is sliced open. Then, layers of crisp greens, seasoned fish fillet, and sliced onions are added to it. Finally, it is finished with a drizzle of sauce. The burger has a savory-tart flavor that truly whets the appetite.
normal.effect: Increases all party members' Max HP by 22% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s).

delicious.name: Delicious Harbor Fish Burger
delicious.description: A fish burger. The hearty bread, tender fish, and crunchy toppings create a collision of textures that compels one to devour it in great, eager bites. Local rumors claim some families have uprooted their entire lives to Dornman Port just for a daily taste of this authentic delicacy. It seems those tales were no exaggeration...
delicious.effect: Increases all party members' Max HP by 25% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s).
